notes: Exercises SkillGuard deep target-specific contract coverage and known shallow-contract failure classes.

fixtures.target_rule: A README skill contract that omits the bilingual mirror obligation fails deep coverage.
A contract that requires a run record fails when no current run record exists.
An ordinary covered skill contract that omits the target-local rule, route, stage, check, evidence, and closure matrix fails deep coverage.
A native contract that permits a parallel SkillGuard execution route fails deep coverage.

residual_risk: These fixtures cover selected deep-contract failure classes, not every target-specific skill domain.
claim_boundary: This fixture manifest governs only explicit deep-contract fixture cases. It does not prove broad AI semantic extraction, runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, external services, or future AI behavior.
